title: Manuscript: Create and insert Figure 1 IPO diagram
description: Capstone Ch1-2. Create 3-box IPO diagram for Conceptual Framework; place below discussion.

title: QR Token Print: Print instructions + cut lines
description: Document cut lines; optional Print instructions tooltip. Min QR size ~2cm for scan reliability. Per QR-TOKEN-PRINT-SYSTEM.md QR-8.

title: BD-010: Station CRUD API + admin UI (nested under program)
description: Per 08-API-SPEC-PHASE1 Section 5.3, 04-DATA-MODEL Table 4. GET/POST programs/{id}/stations, PUT/DELETE stations/{id}. Enforce unique name per program, role_type enum. UI: station list with role_type badges, create/edit modal. Delete blocked if referenced by track steps. Depends on BD-008.

title: BD-007: Create shared Svelte layout components
description:
### BD-007: Create shared Svelte layout components
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: Layouts per `09-UI-ROUTES-PHASE1.md` Section 2. Design system per `07-UI-UX-SPECS.md`. Component mapping per `07-UI-UX-SPECS.md` Section 6.
- **Dependencies**: BD-001.
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - `AppShell.svelte`: wraps all auth pages using DaisyUI `navbar` (header) + custom footer.
  - `AdminLayout.svelte`: extends AppShell using DaisyUI `drawer` + `menu` (240px sidebar nav).
  - `MobileLayout.svelte`: full-width using DaisyUI `navbar` (top) + `dock` (bottom bar).
  - `DisplayLayout.svelte`: minimal chrome for kiosk mode (DaisyUI `navbar` header only).
  - `StatusFooter.svelte`: connection indicator, queue count, clock.
  - `Toast.svelte` + `toastStore`: notification system using DaisyUI `toast` + `alert` components.
  - `OfflineBanner.svelte`: listens to `navigator.onLine`, shows/hides DaisyUI `alert alert-warning` banner.
  - `Modal.svelte`: generic `<dialog>` wrapper using DaisyUI `modal` + `modal-box`.
  - All layouts use DaisyUI semantic classes per `07-UI-UX-SPECS.md` — no raw utility-only styling for standard components.

title: Flow Visualization tab under Programs
description: Add Flow Visualization tab to Admin Programs Show. FlowVisualization.svelte: Informant Desk (Triage), track containers, station boxes with Queue Display links, flow arrows, legend. Per plan Part B.

title: Foundation Layer (BD-001 — BD-007)
description: These must be completed first. They establish the project skeleton.

title: Station display settings: migration + API
description: Add display_view_style and display_sound_enabled to stations table. Add GET/PUT /api/stations/{station}/display-settings for staff. Per flow-visualization plan Part A.4, A.5.

title: Manuscript: Consult statistician for SUS analysis
description: Capstone Ch2. Confirm with statistician treatment of SUS/Likert data and interpretation procedures.

title: Real-Time Integration (BD-036 — BD-039)
Edge Cases (BD-031 — BD-032)
Station Flow (BD-019 — BD-027)
QR Token Print: Print API (selection, validation, batch)
description: GET /api/admin/tokens/print with ids/status/prefix. Validate IDs; skip deleted/invalid; return skip count. Chunk 500 per request; stream PDF; progress. Per QR-TOKEN-PRINT-SYSTEM.md QR-3, QR-4.

title: PIN/QR Auth: Temporary PIN (generate endpoint, TTL, single-use)
description: POST /api/auth/temporary-pin. Store hash, return 6-digit code. Validate on override. Per AUTH-3.

title: Session bind API + Triage UI: POST /api/sessions/bind, QR scanner, category/track select, confirm flow
description: Per 08-API-SPEC-PHASE1 §3.1: POST /api/sessions/bind with qr_hash, track_id, client_category. Handle 409 (token in_use), 409 (lost/damaged), 400 (no active program). Triage page: QR scanner (camera + manual fallback), category selector, track select, confirm bar. Double-scan modal deferred to follow-up. Needs Token API (BD-011) and active program with tracks.

title: Clean up AI slop from UI kit: remove decorative em dashes and improve empty states
description:
Removed all decorative em dashes (—) from components.html UI kit and replaced with proper design patterns:

- Typography annotations: Changed 'Heading 1 — text-4xl' to styled spans with proper sizing info
- Status messages: Changed 'Offline — connection lost' to 'Offline: connection lost'
- Table/station names: Changed 'Table 2 — Interview' to 'Table 2 (Interview)' with proper styling
- Empty states: Replaced decorative '—' symbols with proper empty state icons (X in circle) and descriptive text like 'Empty' or 'No clients'
- Descriptions: Changed 'Mobile (375px) — Staff processes' to 'Mobile (375px) for staff to process'
- Code annotations: Improved spacing and styling for code examples

All decorative dashes removed except legitimate ones in CSS comments and page title. UI kit now has clean, professional appearance without placeholder 'AI slop'.

title: Rename program start/stop to Start session / Stop session in UI
description: Replace 'Activate'/'Stop Program'/'Deactivate' with session-oriented copy: button labels 'Start session' and 'Stop session', modal title/message/confirm (e.g. 'Stop session?' / 'You can only stop when no clients are in the queue.'). Update Programs Index and Programs Show. Keep API endpoints activate/deactivate; only UI copy and aria/labels change. Per user request for clearer meaning.

title: Reports (BD-043 — BD-045)
Station queue UI: call next, transfer, complete, cancel, no-show
description: Build Station/Index.svelte UI per 09-UI-ROUTES §3.3. Fetch queue via GET /api/stations/{id}/queue. Wire buttons to POST /api/sessions/{id}/call, transfer, complete, cancel, no-show. Show now_serving, waiting list, primary action (Transfer/Complete), secondary actions (Override, Cancel), No-show. Station selection for staff/supervisor. Depends on Flow Engine APIs (flexiqueue-fme closed).

title: Document frontend/Inertia gotchas in developing-gotchas rule
description: Added .cursor/rules/developing-gotchas.mdc to avoid repeat bugs: Inertia resolve returning undefined / wrong shape (return { default: component }), form.errors undefined with useForm (use form.errors?.field), build via Sail not host npm, rebuild after adding Svelte pages. Globs: resources/js/**/*.svelte, app.js, vite.config.js, package.json.

title: Identify helpful Cursor skills
description: Evaluate available Cursor skills relevant to flexiqueue project.

title: PIN/QR Auth: Edge cases and tests (wrong PIN lockout, expiry, replay, rate limit)
description: PHPUnit + manual tests for wrong PIN lockout, expiry, replay, rate limit. Per AUTH-6.

title: Replace confirm(): ConfirmModal component
description: Reusable ConfirmModal.svelte: open, title, message, confirmLabel, cancelLabel, variant (danger/warning), onConfirm, onCancel, loading. Uses Modal.svelte + dialog. Per REPLACE-CONFIRM-ALERT-WITH-MODALS.md.

title: Supervisor Override (BD-028 — BD-030)
Manuscript: Create and insert Figure 3 Gantt chart
description: Capstone Ch2. Create Gantt chart with 4 RAD phases and week timeline. Place after Project Plan.

title: BD-003: Create database migrations for all Phase 1 tables
description:
### BD-003: Create database migrations for all Phase 1 tables
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: Schema per `04-DATA-MODEL.md`. 8 tables: programs, service_tracks, track_steps, stations, tokens, sessions, transaction_logs, users (extended).
- **Dependencies**: BD-001.
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - Migration files for all 8 tables with exact column types, nullability, and defaults from `04-DATA-MODEL.md`.
  - Foreign keys with correct ON DELETE behavior (CASCADE / RESTRICT as specified).
  - All indexes created (idx_sessions_active, idx_tokens_hash, idx_logs_session, etc.).
  - `users` table extended with `role`, `override_pin`, `assigned_station_id`, `is_active`.
  - `php artisan migrate:fresh` runs cleanly on empty MariaDB.
  - No `hardware_units` or `device_events` tables.

title: Station queue API + GET /api/stations: queue data for station page
description: Per 08-API-SPEC-PHASE1 §4.1-4.2: GET /api/stations/{id}/queue returns station, now_serving, waiting[], stats. GET /api/stations returns stations for active program with queue_count, assigned_staff. Enforce staff assigned to station or supervisor/admin. Unblocks Station UI (call next, transfer, etc).

title: PIN/QR Auth: Schema (temporary_authorizations, users.override_qr_token)
description: Migration + model. temporary_authorizations: id, user_id, token_hash, type (pin|qr), expires_at, used_at. users.override_qr_token nullable. Per docs/plans/PIN-QR-AUTHORIZATION-SYSTEM.md AUTH-1.

title: BD-001: Initialize Laravel 12 project with Svelte 5 + Inertia.js + TailwindCSS + DaisyUI
description: Foundation. Tech stack per docs. Laravel 12, Svelte 5 (@inertiajs/svelte), TailwindCSS 4, DaisyUI 5. Acceptance: composer create-project laravel/laravel; Inertia server + Svelte 5 + Vite; Tailwind 4 + Inter font; DaisyUI 5 via @plugin in app.css; FlexiQueue theme per 07-UI-UX-SPECS; test page / renders Svelte via Inertia; npm run dev and php artisan serve work.

B1: /admin redirect + Sidebar Users→Staff
description: Completed: GET /admin redirects to /admin/dashboard. Sidebar label Users→Staff. Page title Staff.

title: BD-009: ServiceTrack CRUD API + admin UI (nested under program)
description: Per 08-API-SPEC-PHASE1 Section 5.2, 04-DATA-MODEL Table 2. GET/POST programs/{id}/tracks, PUT/DELETE tracks/{id}. Enforce unique name per program, exactly one default per program. UI: track list with color indicators, default badge, create/edit modal. Depends on BD-008.

title: BD-008: Program CRUD API endpoints + admin UI page
description: Per 08-API-SPEC-PHASE1 §5.1, 09-UI-ROUTES-PHASE1 §3.7. GET/POST/PUT/DELETE programs, activate/deactivate. Admin/Programs/Index with cards, modals, validation name max 100. Depends on BD-004, BD-006, BD-007.

description: Program setup must be complete before triage and station flows work.

description: Will be closed

title: Flow Engine + Session actions: call, transfer, complete, cancel, no-show, force-complete
description: Per 08-API-SPEC-PHASE1 §3.2-3.8: POST sessions/{id}/call, transfer (standard/custom), complete, cancel, no-show, force-complete. FlowEngine service for next-station calc. Transaction logs for each action. Broadcast events to station/global channels. Supervisor PIN for override/force-complete. Depends on Session bind + Station queue.

title: BD-004: Create Eloquent models with relationships and business rule scopes
description:
### BD-004: Create Eloquent models with relationships and business rule scopes
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: Relationships per `04-DATA-MODEL.md` Section "Relationship Summary". Business rules per Section "Key Business Rules".
- **Dependencies**: BD-003.
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - Models: `Program`, `ServiceTrack`, `TrackStep`, `Station`, `Token`, `Session`, `TransactionLog`, `User`.
  - All `belongsTo`, `hasMany`, `hasOne` relationships defined.
  - `TransactionLog` model: `update()` and `delete()` throw exceptions (append-only enforcement).
  - Scopes: `Session::scopeActive()` (status in waiting, serving), `Program::scopeActive()` (is_active = true).
  - `User` model: `role` cast as enum, `override_pin` hidden from serialization.
  - `Token` model: `qr_code_hash` in `$guarded` (immutable after creation).
  - Casts: `capabilities` as array (if needed later), `metadata` as array on `TransactionLog`.

title: BD-006: Create role-based authorization middleware and policies
description:
### BD-006: Create role-based authorization middleware and policies
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: RBAC per `05-SECURITY-CONTROLS.md` Section 3. Middleware: `role:admin`, `role:admin,supervisor`, etc.
- **Dependencies**: BD-005.
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - `EnsureRole` middleware: checks `auth()->user()->role` against allowed roles. Returns 403 if unauthorized.
  - Registered in `bootstrap/app.php` as `role` alias.
  - Route groups applied: admin routes require `role:admin`, override routes require `role:admin,supervisor`.
  - `SessionPolicy`: validates station-scoped access (staff can only act on their assigned station).
  - `StationPolicy`: staff can only view their assigned station's queue.
  - Policy registered in `AuthServiceProvider`.
  - Tests: staff cannot access admin routes (403), admin can access everything.

title: BD-001: Initialize Laravel 12 project with Svelte 5 + Inertia.js + TailwindCSS + DaisyUI
description:
### BD-001: Initialize Laravel 12 project with Svelte 5 + Inertia.js + TailwindCSS + DaisyUI
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: Tech stack per `docs v1/11-tech-decisions.md` and `07-UI-UX-SPECS.md`. Laravel 12, Svelte 5 (via `@inertiajs/svelte`), TailwindCSS 4, DaisyUI 5.
- **Dependencies**: None (first task).
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - `composer create-project laravel/laravel` with Laravel 12.
  - Inertia.js server-side adapter installed (`inertiajs/inertia-laravel`).
  - Svelte 5 + Vite + `@inertiajs/svelte` configured.
  - TailwindCSS 4 installed with `Inter` font imported (bundled locally for offline).
  - DaisyUI 5 installed (`npm install -D daisyui@latest`).
  - DaisyUI configured in `resources/css/app.css` via `@plugin "daisyui"`.
  - FlexiQueue custom theme defined per `07-UI-UX-SPECS.md` Section 2.2.
  - A test page (`/`) renders a Svelte component via Inertia with DaisyUI classes working.
  - `npm run dev` and `php artisan serve` both work.

title: QR Token Print: Template + QR generation (Blade, PHP QR lib)
description: Token print template: Blade view with physical_id, QR placeholder, cut lines. Configurable cards per page (4-8). A4/Letter. Server-side PHP QR library (chillerlan/php-qrcode or endroid/qr-code) for PNG; handle empty hash, library failure. Per docs/plans/QR-TOKEN-PRINT-SYSTEM.md QR-1, QR-2.

title: QR Token Print: Tokens Index Print UI (checkbox, Print selected)
description: Admin Tokens Index: checkbox selection, Print selected button. Warnings for in_use/lost/damaged. Per QR-TOKEN-PRINT-SYSTEM.md QR-5.

title: BD-005: Implement session-based authentication (login + logout)
description:
### BD-005: Implement session-based authentication (login + logout)
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: Auth per `05-SECURITY-CONTROLS.md` Sections 2.1–2.3. Laravel session driver = database.
- **Dependencies**: BD-003, BD-004.
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - Laravel Breeze or manual auth scaffolding (login form + controller).
  - `POST /login` authenticates via email + password.
  - On success: redirect based on role (admin → `/admin/dashboard`, staff → `/station`).
  - On failure: 422 with validation errors.
  - `POST /logout` invalidates session, redirects to `/login`.
  - Rate limiting: 5 attempts / 15 minutes (Laravel `ThrottlesLogins`).
  - Session driver set to `database` in `.env`.
  - `Login.svelte` page renders with Inertia.
  - Auth middleware applied to all non-public routes.

title: Log program session start and stop (audit trail)
description: When an admin starts or stops a program session (activate/deactivate), record an audit entry. Design: either (A) new table e.g. program_audit_log (program_id, staff_user_id, action: session_start|session_stop, created_at) or (B) extend transaction_logs to allow program-level actions (nullable session_id, program_id, new action_type values). Document choice in architecture; implement logging in ProgramService.activate and ProgramService.deactivate.

title: PIN/QR Auth: Override/force-complete UI (Authorize with PIN or QR, Temporary vs Preset)
description: Station page: auth picker integrating temp_pin, temp_qr, preset_pin, preset_qr. Per AUTH-5.

title: B2: Migrations program_supervisors, program_station_assignments, program_suggestions
description: Completed: New tables. Role enum (admin,staff). Migrated supervisors to program_supervisors.

title: Suggested Sprint Plan (4-Week Capstone)
Display board (client-facing informant): GET /display, Now Serving, waiting summary, optional QR status

Admin Tokens Index: table with status badge, filter bar, BatchCreateModal, action dropdown (Mark Lost, Damaged, Available). Depends on BD-010 (Program/Track/Station/Steps done). Unblocks triage bind.

title: BD-002: Configure Laravel Reverb for local WebSocket server
description:
### BD-002: Configure Laravel Reverb for local WebSocket server
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: Real-time per `08-API-SPEC-PHASE1.md` Section 7. Laravel Reverb on port 6001.
- **Dependencies**: BD-001.
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - `php artisan install:broadcasting` completed.
  - Laravel Reverb installed and configured in `.env` (local host, port 6001).
  - `laravel-echo` + `pusher-js` installed on frontend.
  - Echo initialized in `app.js` pointing to local Reverb.
  - `php artisan reverb:start` runs without errors.
  - A test broadcast event fires and is received by a Svelte component.
